apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.description: Created under Developer Settings in the Talon.One Campaign Manager.

deployment.label: Deployment
deployment.description: The base URL of your Talon.One deployment.

createAudience.title: Create Audience
createAudience.description: This creates a new audience entity in Talon.One.

audienceId.label: Segment Audience ID
audienceId.description: You should get this audience ID from Segment.

audienceName.label: Audience Name
audienceName.description: You should get this audience name from Segment.

updateAudience.title: Update Audience Name
updateAudience.description: This updates the audience name if there is an existing audience entity.

audienceId.label: Segment Audience ID
audienceId.description: You should get this audience ID from Segment.

audienceName.label: Audience Name
audienceName.description: You should get this audience name from Segment.

deleteAudience.title: Delete Audience
deleteAudience.description: This deletes the audience entity in Talon.One.

audienceId.label: Segment Audience ID
audienceId.description: You should get this audience ID from Segment.

updateCustomerProfile.title: [Deprecated] Upsert customer profile
updateCustomerProfile.description: This updates attributes and audiences for a single customer profile. **Important:** This Action is deprecated. Use the **Update customer profile** Action instead.

attributes.label: Attribute-Value pairs
attributes.description: Extra attributes associated with the customer profile. [See more info](https://docs.talon.one/docs/product/account/dev-tools/managing-attributes).

customerProfileId.label: Customer Profile ID
customerProfileId.description: The customer profile integration identifier to use in Talon.One.

deleteAudienceIds.label: List of audience ID to dissociate with the customer profile.
deleteAudienceIds.description: You should get these audience IDs from Talon.One.

addAudienceIds.label: List of audience ID to associate with the customer profile.
addAudienceIds.description: You should get these audience IDs from Talon.One.

runRuleEngine.label: Run rule engine
runRuleEngine.description: This runs rule engine in Talon.One upon updating customer profile. Set to true to trigger rules. Setting this property to false improves response times. For audiences changes the runRuleEngine should be true. Default value is false.

attributesInfo.label: Attributes with types
attributesInfo.description: Use this field if you want to identify an attribute with a specific type

updateCustomerProfileV2.title: [Deprecated] Upsert customer profile V2
updateCustomerProfileV2.description: You do not have to create attributes or audiences before using this Action. **Important:** This Action is deprecated. Use the **Update customer profile** Action instead.

customerProfileId.label: Customer Profile ID
customerProfileId.description: The customer profile integration identifier to use in Talon.One.

audiencesToAdd.label: The audiences for the customer to join.

audiencesToDelete.label: The audiences for the customer to leave.

runRuleEngine.label: Run rule engine
runRuleEngine.description: This runs rule engine in Talon.One upon updating customer profile. Set to true to trigger rules.

attributes.label: Attribute-Value pairs
attributes.description: Extra attributes associated with the customer profile. [See more info](https://docs.talon.one/docs/product/account/dev-tools/managing-attributes).

attributesInfo.label: Attributes info
attributesInfo.description: Use this field if you want to identify an attribute with a specific type

updateCustomerProfileV3.title: Update customer profile
updateCustomerProfileV3.description: This updates attributes and audiences for a single customer profile. Create all the required attributes and audiences before using this Action.

customerProfileId.label: Customer Profile ID
customerProfileId.description: The customer profile integration identifier to use in Talon.One.

skipNonExistingAttributes.label: Skip Non-existing Attributes Flag
skipNonExistingAttributes.description: Indicates whether to skip non-existing attributes. If `Yes`, the non-existing attributes are skipped and a 400 error is not returned. If `No`, a 400 error is returned in case of non-existing attributes.

deleteAudienceIds.label: List of audience ID to dissociate with the customer profile.
deleteAudienceIds.description: You should get these audience IDs from Talon.One.

addAudienceIds.label: List of audience ID to associate with the customer profile.
addAudienceIds.description: You should get these audience IDs from Talon.One.

runRuleEngine.label: Run rule engine
runRuleEngine.description: This runs rule engine in Talon.One upon updating customer profile. Set to true to trigger rules.

attributes.label: Attribute-Value pairs
attributes.description: Extra attributes associated with the customer profile. [See more info](https://docs.talon.one/docs/product/account/dev-tools/managing-attributes).

updateCustomerProfilesAudiences.title: Update Multiple Customer Profiles’ Audiences
updateCustomerProfilesAudiences.description: This updates audiences for multiple customer profiles.

data.label: Data item to change customer profile audiences
data.description: An array of JSON objects that contains customer profile identifier and list of audiences to associate and dissociate with the indicated customer profile. Customer profile ID and at least one audience ID are required.

customerProfileId.label: Customer Profile ID
customerProfileId.description: The customer profile integration identifier to use in Talon.One.

adds.label: List of audience ID to associate with the customer profile.
adds.description: You should get these audience IDs from Talon.One.

deletes.label: List of audience ID to dissociate with the customer profile.
deletes.description: You should get these audience IDs from Talon.One.

trackEvent.title: [Deprecated] Track event
trackEvent.description: This records a custom event in Talon.One. **Important:** This Action is deprecated. Use the **Track event** Action instead.

customerProfileId.label: Customer Profile ID
customerProfileId.description: The customer profile integration ID to use in Talon.One. It is the identifier of the customer profile associated to the event.

eventType.label: Event Type
eventType.description: The name of the event sent to Talon.One.

type.label: Type
type.description: Type of event. Can be only `string`, `time`, `number`, `boolean`, `location`

attributes.label: Attribute-Value pairs
attributes.description: Extra attributes associated with the event. [See more info](https://docs.talon.one/docs/product/account/dev-tools/managing-attributes).

attributesInfo.label: Attributes info
attributesInfo.description: Use this field if you want to identify an attribute with a specific type

trackEventV2.title: Track event
trackEventV2.description: This records a custom event in Talon.One. Create the event and all the required attributes before using this Action.

skipNonExistingAttributes.label: Skip Non-existing Attributes Flag
skipNonExistingAttributes.description: Indicates whether to skip non-existing attributes. If `Yes`, the non-existing attributes are skipped and a 400 error is not returned. If `No`, a 400 error is returned in case of non-existing attributes.

customerProfileId.label: Customer Profile ID
customerProfileId.description: The customer profile integration ID to use in Talon.One. It is the identifier of the customer profile associated to the event.

eventType.label: Event Type
eventType.description: The name of the event sent to Talon.One.

attributes.label: Attribute-Value pairs
attributes.description: Extra attributes associated with the event. [See more info](https://docs.talon.one/docs/product/account/dev-tools/managing-attributes).

updateCustomerSession.title: [Deprecated] Update customer session
updateCustomerSession.description: This updates a customer session. **Important:** This Action is deprecated. Use the **Update customer session** Action instead.

customerSessionId.label: Customer Session ID
customerSessionId.description: The customer session integration identifier to use in Talon.One.

callbackDestination.label: Callback Destination URI
callbackDestination.description: This specifies the address of the service and its endpoint to do callback request.

callbackAPIKey.label: Callback API Key
callbackAPIKey.description: This specifies API key and relative header. The header is specified optionally

contentFields.label: Content Fields
contentFields.description: This specifies a list of the fields from the response you need to receive. Comma character is separator. If omitted, all the fields will be forwarded from the response to the callback destination.

callbackCorrelationId.label: Correlation ID
callbackCorrelationId.description: This specifies ID of the request that will be forwarded to the destination URI with the callback request with the same header name. If omitted, the X-Correlation-ID will not be in the callback request.

customerSession.label: Customer Session Data
customerSession.description: This contains all the data related to customer session.

profileId.label: Customer Profile ID
profileId.description: The customer profile integration identifier to use in Talon.One.

couponCodes.label: Coupon Codes
couponCodes.description: Any coupon codes entered. Up to 100 coupons.`

loyaltyCards.label: Loyalty Cards
loyaltyCards.description: Any loyalty cards used. Up to 1 loyalty cards.`

state.label: State
state.description: Indicates the current state of the session. `

cartItems.label: Card Items
cartItems.description:
The items to add to this sessions.

If cart item flattening is disabled: Do not exceed 1000 items (regardless of their quantity) per request.
If cart item flattening is enabled: Do not exceed 1000 items and ensure the sum of all cart item's quantity does not exceed 10.000 per request.`

quantity.label: Quantity
quantity.description: Quantity of item. Important: If you enabled cart item flattening, the quantity is always one and the same cart item might receive multiple per-item discounts. Ensure you can process multiple discounts on one cart item correctly.

returnedQuantity.label: Returned quantity
returnedQuantity.description: Number of returned items, calculated internally based on returns of this item.

remainingQuantity.label: Remaining quantity
remainingQuantity.description: Remaining quantity of the item, calculated internally based on returns of this item.

category.label: Category
category.description: Type, group or model of the item.

position.label: Position
position.description: Position of the Cart Item in the Cart (calculated internally).

attributes.label: Attribute-Value pairs
attributes.description:
Use this property to set a value for the attributes of your choice. Attributes represent any information to attach to this cart item.

Custom cart item attributes must be created in the Campaign Manager before you set them with this property.

[See more info](https://docs.talon.one/docs/product/account/dev-tools/managing-attributes).

additionalCosts.label: Additional Costs
additionalCosts.description: Use this property to set a value for the additional costs of this session, such as a shipping cost.`

additionalCosts.label: Additional Costs
additionalCosts.description: Use this property to set a value for the additional costs of this session, such as a shipping cost.`

attributes.label: Attribute-Value pairs
attributes.description: Use this property to set a value for the attributes of your choice. Attributes represent any information to attach to your session, like the shipping city. [See more info](https://docs.talon.one/docs/product/account/dev-tools/managing-attributes).

sessionAttributesInfo.label: Session Attributes info
sessionAttributesInfo.description: Use this field if you want to identify a session attribute with a specific type

cartItemsAttributesInfo.label: Cart Items Attributes info
cartItemsAttributesInfo.description: Use this field if you want to identify a cart item attribute with a specific type

updateCustomerSessionV2.title: Update customer session
updateCustomerSessionV2.description: This updates a customer session. Create all the required attributes before using this Action.

skipNonExistingAttributes.description: Indicates whether to skip non-existing attributes. If `Yes`, the non-existing attributes are skipped and a 400 error is not returned. If `No`, a 400 error is returned in case of non-existing attributes.

profileId.description: The customer profile integration identifier to use in Talon.One.

state.label: State

cartItems.label: Card Items
cartItems.description:
The items to add to this sessions.

If cart item flattening is disabled: Do not exceed 1000 items (regardless of their quantity) per request.
If cart item flattening is enabled: Do not exceed 1000 items and ensure the sum of all cart item's quantity does not exceed 10.000 per request.`

quantity.label: Quantity
quantity.description: Quantity of item. Important: If you enabled cart item flattening, the quantity is always one and the same cart item might receive multiple per-item discounts. Ensure you can process multiple discounts on one cart item correctly.

returnedQuantity.label: Returned quantity
returnedQuantity.description: Number of returned items, calculated internally based on returns of this item.

remainingQuantity.label: Remaining quantity
remainingQuantity.description: Remaining quantity of the item, calculated internally based on returns of this item.

category.label: Category
category.description: Type, group or model of the item.

position.label: Position
position.description: Position of the Cart Item in the Cart (calculated internally).

attributes.label: Attribute-Value pairs
attributes.description:
Use this property to set a value for the attributes of your choice. Attributes represent any information to attach to this cart item.

Custom cart item attributes must be created in the Campaign Manager before you set them with this property.

additionalCosts.label: Additional Costs
additionalCosts.description: Use this property to set a value for the additional costs of this session, such as a shipping cost.`

additionalCosts.label: Additional Costs
additionalCosts.description: Use this property to set a value for the additional costs of this session, such as a shipping cost.`

identifiers.label: Identifiers
identifiers.description: Session custom identifier that you can set limits on or use inside your rules. For example, you can use IP addresses as identifiers to potentially identify devices and limit discounts abuse in case of customers creating multiple accounts.

attributes.label: Attribute-Value pairs
attributes.description: Use this property to set a value for the attributes of your choice. Attributes represent any information to attach to your session, like the shipping city. [See more info](https://docs.talon.one/docs/product/account/dev-tools/managing-attributes).
